body: Hi, I'd like to book a tap washer replacement for my kitchen sink. Are you available this Friday afternoon between 1pm and 4pm?

subject: No hot water - urgent
body: Hi, our hot water system has completely stopped working. We have three young children at home and it's the middle of winter. We haven't had hot water since yesterday. Please help urgently.
How much does it cost to install a new power point in my bedroom? Just a single outlet on the main floor.

subject: Incorrect charge on my invoice
body: I was charged $150 for the blocked drain service on 8 July, but when I called to book I was quoted $120 over the phone. I have the booking confirmation email showing $120. Please correct this and refund the $30 difference.

subject: Invoice copy request - INV-2847
body: Could you please send me a copy of invoice number INV-2847 from last month? I need it for my tax records and seem to have misplaced the original.

subject: Water coming through ceiling RIGHT NOW
body: There is water pouring through my kitchen ceiling right now. It seems to be coming from the bathroom directly above. I've tried to turn off the main water but the leak is still dripping. Please send someone immediately, this is an emergency.
Our dishwasher has stopped working. The motor sounds like it's running but it's not filling with water. Can you come and diagnose and fix it? It's a Bosch Series 6.

subject: Bathroom renovation plumbing quote
body: My wife and I are planning a full bathroom renovation. We need to move the toilet about 1.5 metres, relocate the shower from the corner to a walk-in, add a second basin, and install a freestanding bathtub with new floor waste. The bathroom is roughly 8 square metres. Could you come out and quote on the plumbing work?
hey my heater stopped working. its freezing in here, 10pm and cant sleep. can someone come tonight or first thing tomorrow?

subject: Electrical and lighting works - strata common areas
body: I'm the building manager for a 48-unit residential strata complex in Parramatta. We need electrical work done on the common area switchboard upgrade and new lighting installed throughout the basement car park. The car park is approximately 450 square metres across two levels. Can you quote on this work?

subject: Complaint about tradie conduct
body: I'm very unhappy with the plumber who came to my house on Tuesday. He was rude and dismissive when I asked questions about the work, left the bathroom in a complete mess, and didn't clean up after himself. I want to make a formal complaint and I'd like to know what you're going to do about it.

subject: Sparking power point
body: One of my power points in the kitchen started sparking when I plugged in the kettle. There's also a burning smell near that wall. I've turned off that circuit at the switchboard. This has happened twice now. Can someone come today?

Can I get a quote to have my split-system air conditioner serviced and cleaned? It's a single unit in the lounge room and hasn't been serviced in about two years. It's starting to smell musty when running.

subject: Reschedule my Thursday appointment
body: Hi, I have a plumbing appointment booked for this Thursday at 9am but something has come up at work and I need to reschedule. Would it be possible to move it to Tuesday or Wednesday next week? Any time in the morning would suit me.

subject: Payment options
body: I just received my invoice from last week's job. Do you accept credit card payments? I'd also like to know if you offer payment plans for larger invoices.

subject: Quote for a few jobs
body: Hi, I'd like to get prices for a few things at my house. I need a safety switch installed on the main circuit, a light fitting replaced in the dining room (I already have the new fitting), and my evaporative cooler serviced before summer. Can you give me prices for all three and we can book them in together?

subject: Demanding full refund - will go to Fair Trading
body: I had one of your plumbers come out last week for what I was told would be a simple repair. I ended up being charged $1,350 and the problem is still not fixed. This is completely unacceptable. I am demanding a full refund of the $1,350 and if this is not resolved immediately I will be lodging a complaint with NSW Fair Trading and leaving reviews on every platform I can find.

We have solar panels on our roof that need cleaning and one of the panels appears to have stopped generating power. The inverter is showing a fault code. Can you help with solar panel maintenance and fault diagnosis?

subject: Gas smell near hot water system
body: I can smell gas near my gas hot water heater in the laundry. I've turned the gas off at the meter like it says to do on the label, but the smell was quite strong. I'm worried about going back in there. Should I leave the house? What do I do?
